scripts.preinstall: node -e "const ua=process.env.npm_config_user_agent||''; const exec=process.env.npm_execpath||''; if(!ua.startsWith('pnpm/')&&!exec.includes('pnpm')){console.error('Use pnpm instead');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" --if-present run typecheck
